text_block_list.text: WAAAAAH!!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: …!? Someone's in trouble! That voice came from the school gates. Let's go!!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
WAAAH! No… No! You're scaring me, Nature! 
Don't come any closer!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, I'm not scary at all! 
Come here… so I can cover you in mud too!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: WAAAH! It's a monster! Go away!!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
…What're those two up to? 
And, uh, why's Nature all caked in mud?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Did Turbo prank her? Or, like, maybe they're having 
a mud party! I lowkey wanna try that☆

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, a mud party, huh? I heard they're all the rage right now! 
Well… I think I did anyway. Maybe?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Real talk though — it looks super lit. C'mon! Let's get dirty!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Sounds good! I'm in!

text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text: Sup, Nature! Wahey!☆

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Nobody invited you!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Um… What do you think is going on?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I haven't got a clue. But we should probably 
call someone just in case ——

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
So this is where you've all been… I thought I told you 
to meet for a joint training session after cleaning.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Geez, Ikuno, you had me shook! Those were some 
serious decibels for just slamming your book. 
Talk about a literal clapback!☆

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Daitaku Helios. Mejiro Palmer. I believe the two of you 
were assigned to cleaning duty for skipping classes 
and playing around.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Well, I didn't want to ditch class. I was just feeling different that day and didn't wanna kill the vibe, ya know?☆

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Geez, you guys are hopeless. 
Guess I'll have to show you how to act right!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Ahem… Twin Turbo. You, too, were given cleaning duty 
as punishment for running around the room during class, 
were you not?

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: That wasn't a punishment! The vice president just asked me to "try and calm down"!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Is that so? Then I apologize. As for you, Nice Nature…

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: …Hm? Why are you here again?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I want someone to tell me that…

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Ooh! I understand now, Dia! It's a skit! 
They must be practicing a comedy routine!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Ah, that makes sense! Where's my coin purse? 
I want to support them…

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: This isn't a skit!! Wait… Huh? You two…

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: B-B-Boom! Kita and Sato, mad props on the cleanup job aaand for joining the academy! Time for a welcome party! Wahey!☆

text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text: Waheeey!! Thank youuu!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: …A party? Really?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Certainly, a celebration would help ease the tension of entering 
an unfamiliar environment. I agree with Helios, actually.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Guess you really can't judge a book by its cover, huh?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much for going out of your way for us! 
You're all so kind!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry for any trouble that Turbo and the others 
may have caused. Incidentally, what were you two 
doing back there?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Ah. Um… Well, actually, we also got assigned 
cleaning duty as a punishment. Ahaha…

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Seriously? That makes us, like, total "prison pals." 
PPs for life! Woohoo!♪

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: So what did you do? Tried nagashi sōmen in the schoolyard? Or maybe a skateboarding contest in the hallway? You're unhinged!

text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text: Er…

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: No, no! They were definitely building an ocean! I mean, Golshi was making waves earlier!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Or maybe they got sucked into one of Marvelous' schemes. 
You two okay? Do you feel like your normal selves…?

text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text: Eeeep!?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Haha, don't scare them, Nature. Don't worry, you two. 
Not all of us here are such wild characters.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Oh, Palmer! Thank goodness at least somebody here is normal!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh, please. Normal's the last word I'd use 
for Little Miss Mejiro Princess here.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Mejiro?! Then you're from 
the same family as McQueen…?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
But wait, there's more! Palmz is the explosive runaway pro, 
the outrunning goddess! My super runaway bestie!☆

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
A-A goddess?! Tracen Academy really is incredible. 
The horsegirls here are literally out of this world…!
Hmm… What should I do?
